name: coffe
description: Step-by-step skill to upgrade existing websites into advanced, animated, responsive experiences while preserving core behavior.
invocation: Use $coffe to upgrade my current website step by step without changing core logic.
workflow: Audit the current site structure, stack, animations, accessibility, and performance.
Freeze functional behavior and preserve business logic unless explicitly approved.
Define target visual direction, typography, color strategy, and motion rhythm.
Apply upgrades in passes: tokens, layout, typography, motion, interactions, accessibility, performance.
Implement one pass at a time and validate after each pass.
Summarize changes, retained behavior, and rationale.
operating_rules: Prefer progressive enhancement over full rewrites.
Preserve or improve accessibility and performance.
Avoid breaking dependencies without explicit approval.
output_contract: Provide a short upgrade plan before edits.
Provide responsive, accessibility, and performance validation notes.
